name: BookIt — Booking System
problem: Booking platforms break under concurrent reservations — double-bookings, failed payments without rollback, and silent notification failures erode user trust.
solution: A full-stack booking system with CQRS architecture that separates commands (CreateBooking, CancelBooking, RescheduleBooking) from queries, with real-time availability updates via WebSocket.
impact: CQRS with dedicated Command and Query handlers. Event-driven domain logic via EventBus. Real-time availability sync through Socket.IO gateway. 9 backend modules with shared type-safe packages.
outcomeMetric: CQRS architecture · 9 backend modules · Real-time WebSocket · Monorepo with 4 shared packages
demoNote: This is a sample project built to showcase code quality and architecture patterns. It runs in demo mode with simulated data. I value time — building more samples so you can evaluate my work across different domains. Clone the repo to explore the full codebase.

gallery.alt: BookIt homepage — search bar, category filters, and hero with demo mode banner
Browse services — category filter tabs, service cards with ratings, pricing, and Book Now buttons
Service detail — price, duration, availability, Book Now CTA, customer reviews with star ratings
Multi-step booking wizard — service selection with stepper (Service → Date & Time → Confirm)
Provider dashboard — stats cards (bookings, revenue, pending), upcoming bookings with status badges

name: FlowBoard — Real-Time Collaborative Kanban
problem: Remote teams need real-time task visibility without page refreshes. Existing tools either lack real-time sync or require expensive per-seat licenses.
solution: A Kanban board with real-time WebSocket collaboration via Socket.IO + Redis pub-sub, fractional indexing for conflict-free drag-and-drop, 4-tier RBAC, AI-powered task parsing, and background job processing with Bull queue.
impact: 12+ NestJS modules forming a modular monolith. Real-time sync via Socket.IO with Redis adapter for multi-instance. AI task parsing via Claude API. Bull queue for email digests, audit logging, and overdue checks.
outcomeMetric: 12+ backend modules · Real-time WebSocket + Redis pub-sub · AI task parsing · Fractional indexing
demoNote: This is a sample project built to showcase code quality and architecture patterns. It runs in demo mode with simulated data. I value time — building more samples so you can evaluate my work across different domains. Clone the repo to explore the full codebase.

gallery.alt: Kanban board — 5 columns (Backlog, To Do, In Progress, In Review, Done) with drag-and-drop task cards, labels, priorities, and assignees
Project analytics — task distribution donut chart, priority breakdown, team workload bar chart, velocity trends
Team RBAC — member management with roles (Owner, Admin, Member), invite system, and role assignment dropdowns
Workspace dashboard — workspace cards with RBAC roles, project count, and Create Workspace action
FlowBoard landing — real-time collaboration tagline with Get Started and Sign In CTAs

name: Money Management — Personal Finance App
problem: Personal finance tools are either too simple (spreadsheets) or too complex (enterprise accounting). No middle ground for individuals who want multi-account tracking with visual insights.
solution: A comprehensive personal finance dashboard with multi-account management across 8 categories (wallet, debt, credit, insurance, investments, savings, scheduled, subscription), transaction categorization, drag-and-drop organization, and exportable PDF/Excel reports.
impact: Unified financial view across 8 categories with real-time charts. PDF and Excel export for tax season. Full auth flow with profile setup. Drag-and-drop for account and category management.
outcomeMetric: 8 financial categories · PDF/Excel export · Drag-and-drop UI · Full auth flow
demoNote: Sample project showcasing frontend architecture. I value time — building more samples so you can evaluate my work. Clone the repo to explore the full codebase.
